message:
feat(remote): add RemoteTransport trait for Phase 1+ protocol integration

Define the transport-agnostic RemoteTransport trait with send() and
try_recv() methods for MessageEnvelope<RemoteMessage> delivery between
nodes. Implementations handle framing, handshake, and version checks
at the transport layer while the runtime remains message-driven and
deterministic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
